member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.seq_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_period, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, decode( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance , 0 , 0 , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_installment ) as emer_installment , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_period,
decode( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance , 0 , 0 , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_installment ) as norm_installment , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_period, decode( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance , 0 , 0 , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_installment ) as spec_installment ,
sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.intarr_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_desc , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_name ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_status_code ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.fund_amount FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr > 0 ) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_loan_code not in ( '0' , '1' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = '31/07/2020' /*รายงานตัวนี้ มีใช้ formatting rules ในรายงานเด้อ*/
